_note: GDX (gold-miners ETF) seed for the 2025-26 TARIFF-driven gold surge — the corrected catalyst (the old gems_seeds.json GDX seed was mis-dated 2024-03). Window 2024-11-01..2026-04-01: baseline -> Feb-2025 tariff entry -> 3x ride -> Feb-27-2026 peak (~$116) -> rollover. Look-ahead-clean: dated at true publication (Trump's tariff trade war driving safe-haven gold), reflects only what was public then. Seed at the early Feb-2025 signal so the curator can catch it before the Oct-2025 145%-China-tariff blow-off. Trade-war family, same as MP.

articles.title: Gold hits a new record as Trump's tariffs and inflation fears drive a safe-haven surge
articles.snippet: Gold set a fresh record as President Trump's tariff trade war and inflation fears drive safe-haven demand. The gold-miners ETF (GDX), leveraged to the bullion price, is the pure play on the move - a specific, datable policy shock, still early as the tariff escalation builds.
